9namespace api {
10class Core {
11public:
12 Core() : m_storage(std::make_shared<world::StorageArena>()) {}
13 ~Core() {};
14
15 template <typename S> void registerSystem() {
16 static_assert(std::is_base_of_v<api::System, S>,
17 "System is not derived from System Base");
18 std::unique_ptr<System> sys = std::make_unique<S>();
19
20 sys->bind(m_storage);
21 sys->update();
22 }
23
24private:
25 std::shared_ptr<world::StorageArena> m_storage;
26};
27} // namespace api
